characters.description: Captain of Omega and accepted leader of roughly two million displaced humans. He must keep the refugees alive while the ship is overcrowded, supplies are failing, and Omega's guidance is unavailable.
characters.name: Bill Henderson

characters.description: Bill's executive officer aboard Omega.
characters.name: Bina Chakravarti

characters.description: Omega's Marine commander and an alternate commander of the ship.
characters.name: Alden Stone

characters.description: A returning senior bridge officer aboard Omega.
characters.name: Hans Norder

characters.description: Omega's returning weapons officer.
characters.name: Felicia Keating

characters.description: A recovered officer who remains alive but comatose in Omega's medical care. His history with Bina weighs on her as the crew struggles to plan its next move.
characters.name: James Riding

characters.description: Omega's returning communications officer.
characters.name: Sally Longfield

characters.description: A Marine pilot assigned as Bill's guard. He protects the captain and remains part of the reduced Marine team responsible for deployments and shipboard security.
characters.name: Splat

characters.description: A returning leader among Omega's surviving Marines.
characters.name: Funnybone

characters.description: One of the surviving Marines aboard Omega.
characters.name: Termite

characters.description: A returning Marine systems specialist skilled in breaching and control work.
characters.name: Tubes

characters.description: An experienced Marine serving with Omega's surviving unit.
characters.name: Guns

characters.description: The returning Roughback leader and liaison aboard Omega.
characters.name: Tull

characters.description: The ancient warship carrying humanity's refugees and a powerful intelligence that has previously aided Bill. Its guidance is now unreachable, leaving the crew to manage the overloaded ship without answers.
characters.name: Omega

characters.description: Omega's adviser and intermediary to Bill. He is unavailable at the start of the crisis, depriving the captain of his usual connection to the ship's intelligence.
characters.name: Val

characters.description: A returning adviser whose guidance Bill normally relies on during tactical planning.
characters.name: Tobias

characters.description: A politically connected Ornu consul whose nephew has been imprisoned after the loss of Omega.
characters.name: Philo

characters.description: An Ornu commander associated with the Imperial effort to recover Omega.
characters.name: Pertinax

characters.description: Bill's mother and Gordon's caregiver after their rescue from forced labor. Living in cramped conditions aboard Omega, she urges Bill to remember those still trapped in other camps.
characters.name: Miriam Henderson

characters.description: Bill's father, physically recovered from Callisto but still suffering severe psychological harm. He lives with Miriam in a tiny compartment among Omega's refugees.
characters.name: Gordon Henderson

characters.description: A fallen Marine honored by the six surviving members of her team.
characters.name: Jen Lambert

characters.description: A fallen Marine memorialized with Jen Lambert by the six surviving members of their team.
characters.name: Kenny Yates

characters.description: An imprisoned former Ornu signifier blamed after the loss of Omega. He believes Pertinax took his place and credit, while his mother seeks Philo's political help to restore him.
characters.name: Philo's former-signifier nephew

characters.description: A rescued political leader who offers Bill and Alden Stone crowd-control equipment as an alternative to lethal force. His unusually large weapons cache leaves both officers wary of his motives.
characters.name: Rescued Slovenian prime minister

characters.description: A field-experienced doctor in the volunteer corps who recognizes that a Marine trainee may have been poisoned and becomes a candidate for medical work.
characters.name: Volunteer-corps doctor

characters.description: A young refugee who leads Bina to a concealed cache of lethal weapons aboard Omega.
characters.name: Young refugee informant

characters.description: The ruler of the Ornu Imperium. He treats Omega's loss as a threat to his authority, compels Philo to restore public confidence, and keeps Philo's imprisoned nephew under Imperial control.
characters.name: Ornu Emperor

characters.description: An armed militia leader exposed after posing as a rescued prime minister. His concealed personnel and weapons reveal that the apparent political ally has been directing a conspiracy aboard Omega.
characters.name: Slovenian militia leader

characters.description: The militia leader's son and successor, who takes operational command after learning of his father's death. He demonstrates his authority by killing the civilian who guided Stone's group.
characters.name: Slovenian coup leader's son

characters.description: A historical Konami figure shown in Omega's Archive. The simulation recounts his investigation of the engineered disease and technological dependence behind his civilization's collapse.
characters.name: Ancient Konami investigator

characters.description: A young Konami revolutionary whom Bina recognizes as the ancient Konami investigator she encountered earlier. Omega addresses him through a box and warns that Konami society is collapsing.
characters.name: Young Konami revolutionary

characters.description: A suspected teammate captured after betraying the human ground force during the defense of the Roughbacks.
characters.name: Captured Marine traitor

characters.description: A powerful, long-lived Konami who offers exclusive financing for a vast spacecraft project. After the project leader rejects both the offer and his use of enslaved void servants, he vows to surpass and destroy the work.
characters.name: Ancient Konami rival

characters.description: An unidentified living bipedal being released from a recovered Primeval cargo pod. It destroys a research drone and kills an Ornu intern before escaping into the facility.
characters.name: Unidentified Primeval pod being
